# INTENT

## User Request

Make it clear when project edits are unsaved, and warn users before leaving the project editor with unsaved changes.

## Requested Outcome

Users see a clear save prompt when they change project settings or uploads, and get a confirmation before leaving without saving.

## Constraints

- Keep scope limited to the project editor.
- Preserve existing save behavior.
- Show the success snackbar after returning to the dashboard.

## Open Questions

- None.
